title: Record soft52 async40 and tool6k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft52 Async40 Tool6k Contract

## Soft 52
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.52 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Async 40
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.40 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 6k
tool result budgets default to 6000 chars with 120-char previews for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status-panel vitest
